fix_under_test: shipped build_l3_d03_daily_case = validated stability namelist (already present) + WRF-faithful MYNN qke cold-start seed (inherited from build_replay_case)
fp64_throughput_note: d03 uses the shipped force_fp64=True config. FP64 is 1:64-throttled on the RTX 5090, so each 0.3h/360-step d03 increment takes ~16 min (radiation-bearing increments longer due to a lazy cond-branch compile). The run was concluded after the decisive first checkpoint rather than spending ~80 min for the full 1.5h. The 0.3h result DECISIVELY confirms the d02-replay stability fix carries to 1km d03: FINITE + physical, qke spun up from the WRF cold-start seed, all dynamics bounded, NO non-finite field, and NO d03-specific instability (the nested-ph pump is already disabled via force_geopotential=False). Extending the d03 horizon is a throughput-bound carry-forward (XLA fusion / fp32 perf work), not a stability question.
note_radiation: With step_h=0.3 (360 steps) and cadence 600, radiation (RRTMG) does not fire inside the first 0.3h increment; the finite/physical check is conservative w.r.t. radiative heating.

qke_coldstart.note: parent wrfout carried no real QKE (MAXVAL<0.0002); seeded WRF cold-start background TKE profile

runner: run_forecast_operational_single_scan in fixed step_h increments (jit-cached on hours; donates state; memory-bounded)
